metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4589
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Subcellular distribution of KCTD12 was assessed in pre-embedding immunoelectron microscopy (Figure 2b) and in immunolabelling of freeze-fracture replicas of the hippocampal CA1 region (Figure 2c). Both techniques localized the anti-KCTD12 immunoreactivity to the plasma membrane of presynaptic and postsynaptic compartments of principal cells that were also stained by anti-GABAB1. Immunogold particles were most abundant at the extrasynaptic plasma membrane of dendritic spines and dendritic shafts of pyramidal cells, but also found at the presynaptic membranes of boutons of putative excitatory cells.

No antibody specificity control in manuscript (minus primary or pre-absorption control). Experimental description: Hippocampal sections of adult Wistar rats.
Genebank accession number: EDM02446.1 (primary sequence in Supplementary Fig. 4)
Epitope used for antibody generation: RRGVHKEGSLGDELLPLGYAEPE (Supplementary Fig. 5)
